introSection: Camel Coaster Goku (Japanese: キャメルコースター悟空) is a steel roller coaster located at Nau Highland Park in Nasu, Nasu, Tochigi, Japan.

sections.title: External links

fullText:
Camel Coaster Goku (Japanese: キャメルコースター悟空) is a steel roller coaster located at Nau Highland Park in Nasu, Nasu, Tochigi, Japan.



Red track and white supports.




 * Camel Coaster Goku on the parks website (Japanese)
